untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition for: (1) Bullish Belt Hold candlestick formation - requires specific wick/body ratio analysis not available in indicator set; (2) Throwback to resistance zone - requires historical resistance level detection and price proximity testing; (3) Breakout detection - requires peak/trough identification. While opening gap and close/body conditions can be approximated, the core reversal pattern recognition cannot be fully expressed with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated entry with opening gap (open > prev_close) and bullish candle body (close > open, body_pct > 0.5). Exit uses simple reversal (close < open). True pattern detection requires candlestick shape analysis and zone/resistance tracking unavailable in the allowed indicator list. Author did not provide specific parameter values for success rates or throwback percentage thresholds.
